audit_items.proof_trace: `_call` (L21-44) always reverts on failure via either assembly bubble-up or `LowLevelCallFailed()` — no success path exists when the low-level call fails. `_multiCall` has no try/catch around `_call` (L58-60), so any revert propagates immediately, and EVM semantics revert all prior state changes atomically. The single caller `AuctionBidder.auctionCallback` (L109) also has no try/catch, preserving the invariant end-to-end.
